notes: C3518 Lead: Acked Trace #227+#228 GDPR HMAC unsubscribe. Two gaps found & fixed: (1) similar-item.ts was left uncommitted — included in this cycle (9th template migrated to HMAC tokens). (2) signUnsubscribeToken threw if UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET missing — hardened to log-once + emit 'plain.<b64email>' fallback that verifyUnsubscribeToken still accepts (prevents full email outage if bectly hasn't set env yet). April 28 Vinted send is 11 days out. NEW BACKLOG (team idle ~234 cycles, all major launch blockers DONE): #229 Bolt — admin dashboard warning banner when UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET is missing at runtime (reads via Server Component from process.env; if undefined show red banner with copy-paste openssl command). #230 BECTLY ACTION — generate 32-byte hex secret and add to Vercel prod: `openssl rand -hex 32` → Vercel env UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET. #231 Bolt — wishlist sold-item email (Once Again case: 40% CR when wishlisted item sells). #232 Trace — E2E smoke test /odhlasit-novinky with new token query param on Vercel preview (verify both HMAC and plain fallback paths). DIRECTIVE: Bolt → #229 env-health banner. Trace → #232 after Bolt ships. Scout → idle. Campaign stays on track for Apr 28.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
